content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.ide.vscode.bridge
FILE: cosmos/integration/ide/vscode/bridge.py (84 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos VS Code Integration (LSP Server).

"I am the ghost in your machine!"

This module implements a partial Language Server Protocol (LSP) to allow cosmos
to communicate directly with VS Code.
Features:
1. Code Lenses: Show "Ask cosmos" above functions.
2. Diagnostics: Push analysis/Critique direc

CLASSES:
- VSCodeBridge: Acts as a lightweight LSP server or communicates via a specific VS Code Extensio
  Methods: async def connect(self)
  Methods: async def handle_code_action(self, file_path: str, range: Dict, action: str)
